response: The Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT), founded in 1861 and consistently ranked #1 among global universities, boasts a vibrant community of 11,500 students and 1,069 faculty members. With an exceptionally low acceptance rate of 3.9% and annual tuition of $57,590, it remains one of the most selective institutions worldwide. MIT's prestige is further underscored by its massive $24.6 billion endowment and an impressive 98 Nobel laureates associated with the university.
